name: proc_creation_win_aspnet_compiler_susp_paths
raw_query: any where (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\aspnet_compiler.exe" and (process.command_line like~ ("*\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Roaming\\*", "*:\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Tasks\\*"))
